description: An excellent combination of superior technology and style, from lotto will keep your feet dry and comfortable all day. Slip into these shoes during your training sessions or chill in them while out with your friends.Upper Synthetic upper for extended durability Perforated upper for breathability Synthetic lace-up system for durability snug Fit Cushioned collar and padded tongue for extremely comfortable grip on the foot Midsole EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel and superior shock absorption Padded sockliner for snug fit and comfort grip Outsole Carbon rubber outsole with zi-zag patterns for enhanced grip on any terrain Extended rubber outsole embedded onto the toe box for superior shock absorption Wash careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
